headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Best Buy Co, Lowers Price Target to $65
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Greg Melich   maintains Best Buy Co (NYSE:BBY) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $70 to $65.

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - April 2026 Breakdown
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (SCHD) has outperformed in 2026, up over 11% YTD versus a flat SPY.
